uplink.description: Typical RAK1906 BME680 indoor reading: 22.5 degC, 45 %RH, 1013.2 hPa, IAQ index 75, 3.65 V battery (LPP channel 1)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds LPP channel-1 payload (temperature type 103, humidity 104, barometer 115, voc/IAQ 138, voltage 116). Raw values confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (temperature_1=22.5, humidity_1=45, barometer_1=1013.2, voc_1=75, voltage_1=3.65); expected.data is the authored normalization.

uplink.description: Air-quality variant with estimated CO2, ambient light and battery percent: 19.8 degC, 60 %RH, 998 hPa, 800 ppm CO2, 350 lux, 88% battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds LPP payload exercising concentration->air.co2 (type 125), illuminance->air.lightIntensity (101) and percentage->batteryPercent (120). Raw values confirmed by reference/upstream-codec.js (temperature_1=19.8, humidity_1=60, barometer_1=998, concentration_1=800, illuminance_1=350, percentage_1=88); expected.data is the authored normalization.

uplink.description: Cold/low-pressure edge: 5.0 degC, 10 %RH, 900 hPa (atmospheric lower bound), IAQ index 400
uplink._note: Synthetic edge-of-bounds LPP payload (pressure at the 900 hPa atmospheric lower bound). Raw values confirmed by reference/upstream-codec.js (temperature_1=5, humidity_1=10, barometer_1=900, voc_1=400); expected.data is the authored normalization.
Upstream returns empty data on a zero-length payload; our codec reports an explicit error rather than a bare {}.

uplink.description: Unrecognized LPP sensor type is rejected
uplink._note: Upstream throws 'Sensor type error!: 250' for an unknown type; our codec converts that into an { errors: [...] } return per the output contract.

uplink.description: Truncated record (barometer type 115 needs 2 bytes, only 1 present) is rejected
uplink._note: Defensive bound check: a record whose declared LPP size runs past the end of the buffer is reported as an error.
